subject: Change MsbAddress Port

Patch Set 3:

does esr handles http/https in the code?
either way, we can merge as it's not working as of today

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> does esr handles http/https in the code?
> either way, we can merge as it's not working as of today

In fact ,esr use two types address in cod : msbDiscoveryIP ( port : 10081)and msbServerAddr(http://127.0.0.1:443), but in fact ,msbServerAddr is not used in the code .esr use ssl way to register it's info into msb  with msbDiscopryIP and Port.so ,i doubted whether this issue is right.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3:
> > 
> > does esr handles http/https in the code?
> > either way, we can merge as it's not working as of today
> 
> In fact ,esr use two types address in code : msbDiscoveryIP ( port : 10081)and msbServerAddr(http://127.0.0.1:443), but in fact ,msbServerAddr is not used in the code .esr use ssl way to register it's info into msb  with msbDiscopryIP and Port.so ,i doubted whether this issue is right.

Supplements:
And i checked the code again ,msbServerAddr is used for locating outter services ,for example:
msbServerAddr + "/api/aai-externalSystem/v11" ,msbServerAddr + "/api/aai-network/v11 as so on.
And in oom ,msb iag has some ports: 80 (http way),443(https way).So ,i think that in esr configuration file , msb address would be changed to "https:/127.0.0.1:443",and in oom directory,msb iag address of esr-gui and esr-server doesn't be changed.
